description_long: This is a large, modern house complex set on a rectangular green plot with multiple flat-roofed sections and a symmetrical layout. The structure features several white cubic volumes connected by walkways, with two large swimming pools on either side and a driveway with parked cars. The front entrance is prominent, leading to a central courtyard, and the property is lined with evenly spaced coniferous trees. The house has expansive windows, flat roofs, and multiple outdoor seating areas, including a rooftop terrace. The landscaping is minimalistic, emphasizing open lawns and geometric water features. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on horizontal planes.
description: A large, modern white house complex with flat roofs, expansive windows, two pools, and minimalist landscaping on a green plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central courtyard, driveway with cars, and rows of trees on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the two large pools, back lawn, and the symmetrical arrangement of the house's wings.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with a clear look at the rear entrance, more trees on the left, and the geometric layout of the house.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the pools, flat-roofed sections, and the open green space surrounding the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent central entry with wide steps, double doors, and a minimalist overhang, flanked by geometric landscaping.
